title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMCycleRoute
description: A dedicated cycling infrastructure element from OpenStreetMap. Represents cycle paths, shared cycle lanes, and bike routes tagged with highway=cycleway or cycleway=* on road ways.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMCycleRoute

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element.

cyclewayType.description: Property. Classification of the cycling infrastructure. Enum:'lane, track, opposite, opposite_lane, shared_busway, path, separate, shared'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:cycleway'

surface.description: Property. Physical surface material of the cycle path. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:surface'

oneway.description: Property. Indicates whether the cycle route is one-way for cyclists. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:oneway'

segregated.description: Property. Indicates whether the cycling infrastructure is physically separated from pedestrian use. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:segregated'

lit.description: Property. Indicates whether the cycle route has street lighting. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:lit'

access.description: Property. Access restriction applying to cyclists on this route. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:access'

widthMeters.description: Property. Width of the cycle path in metres. Units:'m'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:width'

maxSpeed.description: Property. Maximum permitted speed in kilometres per hour. Units:'Km/h'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:maxspeed'

rcnRef.description: Property. Regional Cycle Network route reference number. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:rcn_ref'

ncnRef.description: Property. National Cycle Network route reference number. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ncn_ref'

operator.description: Property. Name of the entity responsible for maintaining this cycle route. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:operator'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item.
